title: Plush Portuguese Bean Stew
description: A comforting and grassy Portuguese dish featuring chilli bean paste, this stew is perfect for a cold evening, whisking away your worries with its fluffy texture and Mediterranean-friendly flavors.

ingredients.name: chilli bean paste
ingredients.notes: use a mild paste for a less spicy stew

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the chilli bean paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the cannellini beans, diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together and the stew has thickened slightly.
Stir in the chopped spinach and cook until it has wilted into the stew.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional spinach if desired.
